V17 harness verification — 4-gate decision tree; BLOCKS Task 2 Swift commit on FAIL

blockers.description: xcodebuild verification of 25-02 plain-mode tests deferred — parallel-build llama-cpp xcframework cache contention in worktree mode
blockers.workaround: Run a clean xcodebuild test on macOS + iOS as the first action in Wave 2, before launching the 25-03 executor

blockers.description: Plan 25-03 Task 3 Step C shows a Python CLI invocation with flags that don't exist on run_v16_matrix.py
blockers.workaround: Real flags are --variants (plural), --fixtures, --out (no --append-tsv). Either add the missing flags or wrap in a small append-aware script mirroring run_h8_h9.py

blockers.description: 10 commits ahead of origin/feature/debug-recording-and-cleanup. Per CLAUDE.md push cadence rule, push at Phase/GSD-step boundaries — Wave 1 done is a push checkpoint
blockers.workaround: Push the branch at the start of the next session before Wave 2 work

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm/run git push origin feature/debug-recording-and-cleanup at session start
human_actions_pending.context: 10 commits ahead, Wave 1 completion is the natural push boundary

human_actions_pending.action: Wave 3 (plan 25-04) requires a 3-day live dictation capture — must be a separate multi-day session, not Wave 2
human_actions_pending.context: Capture window v2 needs V16 + dictionary expansion in production for at least 3 days to gather A/B data

decisions.decision: Plan 25-03 task order flipped: dictionary expansion is now Task 1, prompt is Task 2
decisions.rationale: H8/H9 matrix evidence (commit 4b93acc) showed dictionary does ~90% of brand-fixing work. H9 aggregate 72 beats V15+LLM (90) with zero LLM calls. Original §7 V16-COMPOSITE recommendation superseded by §5 hybrid.

decisions.decision: Skip H1 (always-on canonical brand injection) in V16-COMPOSITE
decisions.rationale: H1 caused Dokploy → Docker brand-specificity regression in the matrix; dictionary expansion (Lever 1) supersedes its purpose without the regression risk

decisions.decision: Conditional H5 (acro_enum anti-regression few-shot) — adopt only if V17 verification shows acro_enum > 0
decisions.rationale: Matrix showed acro_enum 42→0 swing was V15's self-inflicted wound; plain mode (H8/H9) is already at 0. May not be needed in V16-COMPOSITE

decisions.decision: Plan 25-03 Task 3 (V17 verification) is a HARD GATE on Task 2
decisions.rationale: V16F bundle catastrophe (lev 44 on feeding→fitting) proved composite prompts can regress unpredictably. Verify before Swift code ships.

decisions.decision: Plain-mode JSONL logging was already live in production code (TextProcessingService.swift:224 #if DEBUG_RECORDER is at OUTER scope, not gated by aiCleanup) — discovered during 25-02 execution
decisions.rationale: The original 218/218 aiCleanup ratio was a usage artifact (user only dictated in AI mode), not code suppression. Plan 25-02 pivoted from 'add a write path' to 'document the contract + lock with parity tests'.

decisions.decision: DEBUG_RECORDER schema not changed (Steps.llm_prompt/llm_raw/post_gate are already Optional at DebugRecorder.swift:74-76)
decisions.rationale: Pre-flight verified during 25-02 plan-check; plain-mode records simply omit those keys

next_action: (1) /gsd-resume-work to reload context. (2) Confirm git push of the 10 ahead commits. (3) xcodebuild test of 25-02 plain-mode tests (macOS + iOS) — was deferred from Wave 1. (4) Read .planning/debug/harness/results/v16_matrix.md addendum (§1b/§2.8/§2.9/§4/§5) — this is the authoritative evidence behind the revised 25-03 plan. (5) Spot-check the revised 25-03 plan file (was Write-reconstructed not Edit-patched; grew 393→631 lines so no truncation but worth eyes). (6) /gsd-execute-phase 25 --wave 2.
context_notes: Wave 1 produced two big revelations that reshaped Phase 25: (a) plain-mode logging was already live, just unused (b) dictionary substitution does ~90% of brand-fixing work, not the LLM. The revised plan 25-03 ships dictionary expansion FIRST (highest ROI, deterministic), then a smaller prompt change (H3+H4 only), with a hard V17 verification gate before Swift code commits. Don't ship H1 — it regresses brand specificity. The matrix.md addendum is the source of truth for any 25-03 implementation question. Memories project_dictionary_dominates_brand_fixing and project_v15_capture_findings carry the analytical context.
